result.stdout:
Description:
  Tool for generating TypeScript definitions from C# code

Usage:
  TypeContractor.Tool [options]

Options:
  --assembly <assembly> (REQUIRED)             Path to the assembly to start with. Will be relative to the current directory
  --output <output> (REQUIRED)                 Output path to write to. Will be relative to the current directory
  --root <root>                                Relative root for generating cleaner imports. For example '~/api'
  --clean <None|Remove|Smart>                  Choose how to clean up no longer relevant type files in output directory. Danger! [default: Smart]
  --replace <replace>                          Provide one replacement in the form '<search>:<replace>'. Can be repeated
  --strip <strip>                              Provide a prefix to strip out of types. Can be repeated
  --custom-map <custom-map>                    Provide a custom type map in the form '<from>:<to>'. Can be repeated
  --packs-path <packs-path>                    Path where dotnet is installed and reference assemblies can be found. [default: C:\Program Files\dotnet\packs\]
  --dotnet-version <dotnet-version>            Major version of dotnet to look for [default: 10]
  --log-level <Debug|Error|Info|Warning>       [default: Info]
  --build-zod-schemas                          Enable experimental support for Zod schemas alongside generated types.
  --generate-api-clients                       Enable experimental support for auto-generating API clients for each endpoint.
  --api-client-template <api-client-template>  Template to use for API clients. Either 'aurelia', 'react-axios' (built-in) or a path to a Handlebars file, including extension [default: aurelia]
  --casing <Camel|Kebab|Pascal|Snake>          Casing to use for generated file names [default: Kebab]
  -?, -h, --help                               Show help and usage information
  --version                                    Show version information

Usage:
  TypeContractor.Tool [options]

Options:

  --replace <replace>                          Provide one replacement in the form '<search>:<replace>'. Can be repeated

  --build-zod-schemas                          Enable experimental support for Zod schemas alongside generated types.
  --generate-api-clients                       Enable experimental support for auto-generating API clients for each endpoint.
